steps.title: Use the emotional clue
steps.content: The passage says the paintings are emotionally powerful because their age creates a link of shared humanity with the artists. The word resonance points to emotional impact, so the blank needs a word meaning moving or touching.

steps.title: Match the precise meaning
steps.content: Choice A describes clever invention, Choice B describes careful detail, and Choice C describes preserved condition. None of those captures emotional power. The word that fits the shared-humanity connection is affecting, meaning emotionally moving. The answer is D.
